criteria.criterion: DBB-m18-001: wc tab-separated output — full, -l, -w, -c all use \t separator (verified in src/index.ts lines 966-969)
DBB-m18-002: unknown command returns exit code 2 (exitCodeFor() line 223: /command not found/ → 2). Tested in exit-code-distinction.test.ts.

DBB-m18-003: mkdir .keep fallback — mkdirOne() lines 745-751: when fs.mkdir is undefined, falls back to fs.write(path + '/.keep', ''). When fs.mkdir exists, uses native method. Tested in mkdir-no-keep-fallback.test.ts.
